summary:
Iteration 3 verification after adding photography (WebDisc) + richer narrative copy to Timeline milestones. Backend unchanged; 7/7 pytest still pass. Frontend: Timeline section renders correctly between About and Academics (DOM section order confirmed: home > about > timeline > academics > admissions > events > contact). All 6 milestone cards (milestone-0..milestone-5) render with year (1974/1988/2001/2012/2019/2026), title, description paragraph, and italic mint-coloured alum/event note — verified via computed fontStyle on

. Each card contains a circular (WebDisc) with an Unsplash src — on probe 5/6 had naturalWidth=900, the 6th was marked complete=true with nw=0 on first probe (likely CDN-lazy, not a bug; tag with valid src is present). Each WebDisc overlays a spider-web SVG with exactly 12 spokes () + 5 concentric rings () = verified. Year badges #01..#06 present under each disc. Scroll-driven spider-along-path animation still works (visible in timeline screenshot: spider crawling between 2012 and 2019 milestones). Hero shimmer: animation-name='shimmerText' with lavender->peach->mint linear gradient. Regressions clean: nav-academics/events/contact buttons scroll correctly, Events list renders 5 cards, admissions form submits successfully ('Inquiry received — our admissions team will reach out within 48 hours.'), backend /api/events|/admissions|/contact respond 200. Zero console or page errors on load or interaction.
critical_code_review_comments: Timeline.jsx: uses loading='lazy' on — good for perf; images are external Unsplash URLs and one of six occasionally probes naturalWidth=0 on first render (lazy deferred). Not a bug, but if offline/CSP blocks Unsplash the circular disc will show only the web overlay without a photo. Consider adding an onError fallback tint or blurred backup colour for graceful degradation.

Timeline.jsx: m.alum paragraph uses 'inline-block' + border-l-2 pl-3 with direction:'ltr' — on the right-aligned (side==='left') cards the italic note visually sits flush right with a left border, which reads slightly off (border on 'wrong' side of the text). Consider swapping to border-r-2 pr-3 when side==='left' for visual symmetry. Minor polish, not blocking.
Timeline.jsx: toneFilter supports 5 tones; all 6 milestones reference valid tones — OK. If a future milestone uses an unknown tone the filter silently falls back to '' (no filter), which is fine.

Timeline.jsx: WebDisc size 128px on every viewport — on mobile (<=390px) the 46%-wide milestone card minus a 128px disc leaves very little room for the text column. Consider reducing WebDisc size responsively (e.g. w/h 88 on sm).
Carryover from prior iterations (unrelated to this change): FastAPI startup/shutdown deprecation warnings; CORS allow_credentials=True with '*' origin. Neither addressed this iteration.
seed_data_creation: Playwright submitted TEST_Iter3Student admission via live UI (persists in admissions collection). No backend seed changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Timeline testids: section='timeline-section', section id='timeline', milestones='milestone-0..5'. Each milestone contains (Unsplash), an
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 9 review_request criteria verified end-to-end on live preview URL.
